sn38.14:1.1:
1
"Friend Sāriputta, it is said, ‘suffering, suffering.’ What now is suffering?"
sn38.14:1.2: "There are, friend, these three kinds of suffering: the suffering due to pain, the suffering due to formations, the suffering due to change. These are the three kinds of suffering."
sn38.14:1.3: "But, friend, is there a path, is there a way for the full understanding of these three kinds of suffering?"
sn38.14:2.2: "There is a path, friend, there is a way … this Noble Eightfold Path … ."
